title: Black Arcade (Phonk Gaze Genre - DERIVATIVE - Lyrics 1.0)
caption: Phonk Gaze genre - untouched pure AI
about: Phonk Gaze with half-time snap, swung hi-hats, distorted sub hits, and woozy detuned synth leads; verse stays sparse with close-mic vocal and chopped ad-libs, pre-chorus opens on filtered chords and reversed swells, chorus lands with a grim chant and layered doubles, Ear candy: tape warble between lines, sub drops into the hook, pitch-bent vocal chops, Brightly compressed but shadowy and gritty, simple
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
I walk in slow
Through the black arcade
You talk too loud
But I still don't fade

Red on my ring
Cold on my teeth
I keep my face
Where you can't reach

[Pre-Chorus]
Step by step
I don't slip
Eyes locked in
Grip by grip

[Chorus]
Hold my line
Hold my line
I don't break
I don't bend

Hold my line
Hold my line
Come too close
Come to an end

[Verse 2]
You want my seat
You want my seat
I leave you there
With a hollow beat

I keep that stare
Sharp and clean
I move like a cut
Through the in-between

[Pre-Chorus]
Step by step
I don't slip
Eyes locked in
Grip by grip

[Chorus]
Hold my line
Hold my line
I don't break
I don't bend

Hold my line
Hold my line
Come too close
Come to an end

[Bridge]
Hands stay calm
Voice stays low
One wrong move
And you already know

[Chorus]
Hold my line
Hold my line
I don't break
I don't bend

Hold my line
Hold my line
Come too close
Come to an end
